app.title: FMS — Facility Management System
app.description: Monitor check-in, check-out, attendance and performance. Offline-first.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.emptyDesc: You're all caught up. New notifications will appear here.

topbar.noNotificationsDesc: When you have new notifications, they'll show up here.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.spherexWeeklyActivityDesc: Employee check-ins and check-outs this week
dashboard.lprWeeklyAccessDesc: License plate recognition activity this week
dashboard.farouqWeeklyActivityDesc: FMS employee check-ins and check-outs this week

toast.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
toast.zoneCreateError: Failed to create zone. Please try again.
toast.zoneUpdateError: Failed to update zone. Please try again.
toast.employeeAddError: Failed to add employee. Please try again.
toast.employeeUpdateError: Failed to update employee. Please try again.
toast.employeeStatusError: Failed to update account status. Please try again.
toast.shiftUpdateError: Failed to update shift. Please try again.
toast.shiftDeleteError: Failed to delete shift. Please try again.
toast.adminCreateError: Failed to create admin. Please try again.
toast.adminUpdateError: Failed to update admin. Please try again.
toast.adminStatusError: Failed to update account status. Please try again.

enroll.title: Face enrollment
enroll.welcome: Hi, {{name}}. Complete a few quick camera steps to finish setup.
enroll.introBody: We will ask for three photos: facing the camera, then turning slightly right, then slightly left. Allow camera access when prompted.
enroll.cameraDenied: Camera access was denied. Allow the camera in your browser settings and try again.
enroll.captureFailed: Could not capture this frame. Try again.
enroll.reviewBody: Review your photos. Submit to finish, or start over to retake.
enroll.submitFailed: Submission failed. The link may have expired—ask for a new one.
enroll.doneBody: You can close this window. Your administrator will see your face enrollment as complete.
enroll.invalidLink: This enrollment link is invalid or has already been used.
enroll.sessionError: We could not verify this link. Check your connection and try again.
enroll.expiredBody: This link is no longer valid. Ask your administrator to send a new face enrollment link.
enroll.needFront: A front-facing photo is required to submit.

pose.front: Look straight at the camera. Center your face in the frame.
pose.right: Turn your head slightly to the right (show more of your left cheek to the camera).
pose.left: Turn your head slightly to the left (show more of your right cheek to the camera).

auth.signInDesc: Enter your credentials to access your organization.
auth.signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.signInNotConfigured: Sign-in is not configured. Set FMS_EMAIL and FMS_PASSWORD in the backend .env file.

onboarding.licenseSubtitle: Enter the license key provided to activate and set up your organization. You can find it in your purchase or welcome email.
onboarding.licenseHint: If validation fails, wait a few seconds for the backend to finish starting, then try again.
onboarding.licenseInvalid: Invalid or expired license key. Please check and try again.
onboarding.licenseValidationFailed: Could not validate license. Please try again.
onboarding.setupAccountSubtitle: Create your account and get access to your organization.
onboarding.organizationDesc: We'll start by setting up your organization with just the essentials — no long forms, just the key info we need to tailor your experience.
onboarding.companyDetailsDesc: Add a few details about your facility — employee count, cameras, and departments. You can update these later in settings.
onboarding.connectingSubtitle: Connecting to your organization cloud and loading settings.
onboarding.allSetSubtitle: Your organization is ready. Sign in with your credentials to continue.

employees.title: People
employees.profilePhotoWireframeDesc: Upload a profile photo for this employee. It appears as their avatar across the system.
employees.faceEnrollmentWireframeDesc: Send this person a secure link to complete their face scan. Used for access control.
employees.enrollmentDisabledUntilSaved: Disabled until the person is saved.
employees.faceEnrollmentHint: After you save, we can generate a secure link so this person can scan their face on their own phone or laptop.
employees.optionalFaceCaptureHint: Optional: register the face now on this computer (requires the local AI service). Otherwise use the link after saving.
employees.optionalFaceSaveNote: Person was saved. You can send a face enrollment link or try again from their profile.
employees.addSuccessEnrollmentHint: Share this link with the person so they can complete face enrollment:
employees.enrollmentNoEmailHint: Add an email address next time to auto-generate a face enrollment link. You can also send a link from the People list or person profile.
employees.toastEnrollmentLinkNoEmail: Add an email address for this person before sending an enrollment link.
employees.toastEnrollmentLinkFailed: Could not create the enrollment link. Try again.
employees.toastEnrollmentLinkSentCopied: Enrollment link for {{name}} was created and copied to your clipboard.
employees.toastEnrollmentLinkNetworkError: Network error while sending the enrollment link. Check your connection and try again.
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search by person name, location or schedule
employees.emptyTableMessage: Get started by adding your first person. You can assign locations, schedules, and optional face recognition later.
employees.confirmEmployeeDeactivateMessage: This person will be marked inactive. You can activate them again from their profile or from this list.
employees.confirmEmployeeActivateMessage: This person will be marked active again and included in check-ins and normal operations.
employees.productivityDefinition: Composite score from punctuality, check-out completion, and average daily hours.
employees.addEmployeeSubtitle: Add a new person. Fill in the details below.
employees.validationZones: Please select at least one location
employees.validationSubZones: Please select at least one zone
employees.zonesHint: Assign this person to one or more locations.
employees.subZonesHint: Pick the zones (within locations) this person should operate in.
employees.noSubZonesAvailable: Select one or more locations to load available zones.
employees.addSuccessText: The new person has been added successfully. You can add another or return to the list.
employees.facialRegistrationDesc: Face registration is required to create a person. Ensure good lighting and look directly at the camera.
employees.facialModalHint: Follow the steps: align in the guide, blink once, turn left and right, then face the camera for the photo. Good lighting helps.
employees.faceRegStatusNoFace: No face detected. Look at the camera.
employees.faceRegStatusCenter: Center your face in the oval.
employees.faceRegStatusFarther: Step back slightly — keep your full head in view.
employees.faceRegStatusTurnLeft: Slowly turn your head to your left.
employees.faceRegStatusTurnRight: Slowly turn your head to your right.
employees.faceRegStatusStraighten: Face the camera and level your head.

personTypes.title: Person Types
personTypes.pageDescription: Define and manage person types (e.g. Employee, Student, Patient) used in the People module.
personTypes.searchPlaceholder: Search by type name or description
personTypes.noResults: No person types match your search
personTypes.emptyMessage: Add person types to use in the People module (e.g. Employee, Student, Visitor).
personTypes.deleteAssignedWarning: This person type is assigned to {{count}} people. Remove their assignment before you can delete this type.
personTypes.cannotDeleteInUse: This person type is assigned to {{count}} people. Cannot delete.
personTypes.cannotDeleteInUseShort: This person type is in use and cannot be deleted.

accessLogs.emptyDesc: Check-in and check-out activity will appear here when employees use the system.
accessLogs.loadError: Failed to load access logs. Check the connection and try again.
accessLogs.pageDescription: View and filter activity records for all people.
accessLogs.exportColumnsHint: Choose which data to include in the export.

zones.title: Locations
zones.pageDescription: View and manage locations, assigned schedules and people.
zones.numberOfSubZonesHint: Choose how many zones this location should have. Each zone gets its own name, camera IP, and RTSP link.
zones.numberOfZonesHint: Choose how many zones this location should have. Each zone gets its own name, camera IP, and RTSP link.
zones.validationZones: Complete each zone with a name, camera IP, and RTSP URL before saving.
zones.validationSubZones: Complete each sub-zone with a name, camera IP, and RTSP URL before saving.
zones.numberOfCamerasHint: Choose how many cameras this zone will have. Corresponding camera fields will appear below.
zones.noZonesCreatedDesc: Create your first location to assign schedules and people.
zones.searchPlaceholder: Search by location name or created by
zones.newZoneSubtitle: Add a new location. Fill in the details below.
zones.createSuccessText: The new location has been created successfully.
zones.confirmRemoveCamera: Remove this camera from the zone?
zones.vendorHint: Select your DVR vendor for automatic RTSP URL generation.
zones.manualRtspHint: Enter a full RTSP URL manually, or use DVR mode above to auto-generate.

shifts.title: Schedules
shifts.pageDescription: View and manage schedules and assigned people.
shifts.noSchedulesSubtext: Create your first schedule to start assigning people to work periods.
shifts.noShiftsCreatedDesc: Create your first schedule to assign to locations and people.
shifts.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
shifts.cannotDeleteMessage: This schedule is assigned to {{count}} people. Please reassign or remove those people before deleting this schedule.
shifts.searchPlaceholder: Search by schedule name or created by
shifts.newShiftSubtitle: Add a new schedule. Fill in the details below.
shifts.createSuccessText: The new schedule has been created successfully.
shifts.breakGracePeriodHelp: Minutes (1–60). How many minutes after Break End a person can return without being marked late.
shifts.noEmployeesInShift: No people assigned to this schedule
shifts.noSchedulesForPersonType: No schedules available for this person type. Please create one in the Schedules module.
shifts.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
shifts.confirmDeleteEmployeesWarning: {{count}} person(s) are assigned to this schedule. You must reassign them before deleting.
shifts.validationWorkingDays: Please select at least one working day.
shifts.workingDaysWarning: Changing the working days will affect absence tracking for all people assigned to this schedule. Existing attendance records will not be changed.

admins.pageDescription: Create and manage sub-admins and their module access.
admins.fullAccessNote: Super admins have full access to all modules. Change role to Sub Admin to limit access.
admins.createAdminComingSoon: Create sub-admin flow will be available here soon.
admins.confirmBlockMessage: They will lose access to the system until you unblock them.
admins.confirmUnblockMessage: They will be able to sign in and use their assigned modules again.
admins.confirmDeactivateMessage: They will lose access to the system until you activate the account again.
admins.confirmActivateMessage: They will be able to sign in and use their assigned modules again.
admins.newAdminSubtitle: Add a new admin. Enter their details and assign role and module access.
admins.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
admins.validationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

reports.pageDescription: Manage email report recipients. Reports are sent by name to the listed addresses.
reports.generateModalHint: Select a from and to date to filter the data.
reports.productivityDefinition: Composite score from on-time check-ins, check-out completion, and schedule availability.
reports.noDataTypeSelected: Select at least one data type in Export settings.
reports.noExportData: No export data found for selected modules and date range.
reports.exportAdvancedHint: Enable optional summary and file-splitting behaviors for generated reports.
reports.exportIncludeIndividualSummary: Include individual summary table (activities, check-ins, check-outs, productivity)
reports.exportSplitByModuleFiles: Split export into separate files by module
reports.confirmDeleteMessage: {{email}} will no longer receive report emails. This cannot be undone.
reports.duplicateEmail: This email is already added as a recipient. Use a different address.
reports.downloadError: Failed to download report. Please try again.

settings.configTimeDescription: Set start and end times for check-in and check-out windows. The system uses these windows to determine when employees can check in or check out.
settings.timeConfigErrorCheckIn: Check-in start time must be before end time.
settings.timeConfigErrorCheckOut: Check-out start time must be before end time.
settings.checkingForUpdates: Fetching and checking for latest version…
settings.updateAvailableMessage: A new version ({{version}}) is available with improvements and fixes.
settings.agreeToUpdate: Do you want to update to the latest version now?
settings.upToDateMessage: You have the latest version of the application. No update is required.
settings.automaticUpdateDescription: The application will check for and install updates when available.
settings.demoDataDescription: Add sample employees, locations, schedules, and people logs to this device only. Data is not synced to the cloud.
settings.demoDataLoaded: Demo data loaded: {{personTypes}} person types, {{zones}} locations, {{shifts}} schedules, {{employees}} employees, {{activities}} activities.
settings.autoUpdateModalMessage: The application will check for and install updates when available. Do you want to enable automatic updates?
settings.exportSettingsHint: Choose file format and which data to include when exporting.
settings.fileFormatHint: Select the format for exported files.
settings.dataToExportHint: Select which data will be included in exports.
settings.onboardingCameraDescription: This camera is used when an employee is to be added (e.g. to capture photo or face during onboarding).
settings.noOnboardingCameraHint: Add a camera to use when adding new employees.
settings.onboardingCameraRtspHint: IP address or full RTSP URL of the camera used for employee onboarding.
settings.cameraSectionDescription: Configure cameras used for employee check-in and check-out.
settings.noCamerasHint: Add a camera to use for check-in or check-out.
settings.cameraIpRtspHint: IP address or full RTSP URL of the camera for check-in/check-out.
settings.preferencesBrandingDescription: Customize how your app name and logo appear in the sidebar and header.
settings.preferencesAppNameHint: Name shown in the sidebar and across the app. Leave empty to use the default.
settings.preferencesLogoHint: Logo shown in the sidebar. Recommended size 96×96 px.
settings.licenseSubtitle: Your license is monitored here. Renew before expiration to avoid service interruption.
settings.streamTesterDescription: Test RTSP camera connections from your configured zones. Verify that cameras are reachable before going live.
settings.streamTesterModalHint: Select a zone camera to test its RTSP connection.
settings.streamTesterSearch: Search by location or zone name
settings.streamTesterNoCameras: No locations with cameras found. Add cameras in the Locations module first.
settings.streamTesterSelectHint: Pick a zone camera from the list on the left to test its stream connection.
settings.streamTesterReadyPrompt: Press the button below to test this camera's connection.
settings.streamTesterTestingHint: Verifying RTSP reachability, this may take a few seconds.
settings.streamTesterNoFfmpegHint: Live stream preview requires ffmpeg. Install it via Homebrew (brew install ffmpeg), apt, or download from ffmpeg.org, then restart the app.

faceRecognition.openTestHint: Opens a live modal to identify registered people in real-time and list everyone seen.
faceRecognition.modalSubtitle: InsightFace identifies registered people and logs all detections in this session.
faceRecognition.cameraPlaceholder: Start test to open camera preview.
faceRecognition.cameraNotSupported: Camera is not supported in this environment.
faceRecognition.noPersonYet: No recognized person yet in this session.

profile.pageDescription: Manage your account details and password.
profile.name: Name
profile.signInToView: Sign in to view your profile.
profile.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
profile.changePasswordHint: Update your password to keep your account secure.
profile.passwordNote: Use at least 6 characters. We recommend a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.
profile.errorPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.errorPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
